scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/cider-plugin build && bun run --cwd apps/bridge build && bun run --cwd apps/plasmoid build && bun run --cwd packages/protocol build && bun run --cwd packages/test-utils build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/cider-plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/bridge typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/plasmoid typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/protocol typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/test-utils typecheck
